name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf NYC-FIDI is a high-tech indoor golf simulator venue located in Manhattan's Financial District. It features nine Trackman-equipped simulator bays with access to over 200 virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. The venue combines a driving range, sports bar, and event space under one roof, with a full-service bar offering chef-inspired food and drink menus. The facility provides a casual, welcoming atmosphere with no dress code, making golf accessible to players of all skill levels. Additionally, it hosts corporate events, private parties, and offers lessons, league play, and custom club fitting services through its certified coaching staff.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides accurate, actionable swing data
Access to 200+ world-class virtual courses including PGA Tour venues
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible and welcoming for all skill levels
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu create a social and entertaining experience
Coaching and lessons available from certified professionals using high-speed camera systems

food_and_drink.notes: Full chef-inspired menu available for dining in and events
Full-service bar with various drink options available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology with high-speed swing cameras

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue has its own full-service bar and kitchen with a chef-inspired menu.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf is kid-friendly and offers junior clinics, kids' birthday parties, and welcomes families.
